steps.title: Find the initial value
steps.content:
In $f(t)=12t+7$, the constant term is the value when $t=0$.
$$f(0)=12(0)+7=7$$

steps.title: Interpret the context
steps.content: The variable $t$ is months after Maya purchased the jade plant, so $t=0$ is the purchase time. The estimated length then was $7$ inches. The answer is D.
